confidence_rationale: Video shows only extracorporeal knot formation without the complete FLS Task 4 sequence. Cannot assess suture placement through Penrose drain marks, knot pushing, or final positioning which are essential components of Task 4 scoring.
cannot_determine: Penrose drain presence and suture placement accuracy
Knot pusher technique and final knot positioning
Complete task completion including suture cutting
Actual FLS Task 4 performance versus knot tying demonstration
technique_summary: Excellent extracorporeal Roeder knot formation technique demonstrated with clean, systematic approach. However, this appears to be a knot tying demonstration rather than complete FLS Task 4 performance.
improvement_suggestions: Complete demonstration should include full FLS Task 4 sequence with Penrose drain
Show knot pusher technique and final positioning at target marks
